item.title: MGT - IP location tool
item.description: Jan 2013 — Jul 2015 Acted as the subject field expert and as the main and the only developer. Implemented database cache design to cache IP information from external API.

item.title: Malware reporter bot
item.description: 2014-02 — Sep 2015 Implemented application solo from scratch. Acted as the subject field expert and as the main and the only developer. C# SkypeBot automatically reports phishing and malware websites to hosters.

item.title: Techportal
item.description: Java 8, Spring (Core), Hibernate, git, React. Implemented the core database design of 6 tables for the module. Implemented the business layer features. Implemented user web-UI module using React.

item.title: REHA.Complete
item.description: REHA.Complete The web CRM for Austrian government rehabilitation healthcare organization. The application handles the entire lifecycle of clinical orders, vital signs management, printing reports, diagnoses management, and other aspects of clinic operations.

item.title: Bank service - Underwriting
item.description: The stack mostly contained micro-libraries. The mapping to well-known stack is following: Broker - Alpha framework (written in-house) Transactions - Alpha framework ORM - JOOQ DI - Guice REST - Spark regular stack: Java, Kotlin, Postgress, SQL, Bitbucket, Docker, Grafana, Google Cloud Platform, Teamcity.

item.title: Taxi service - voice order
item.description: Implemented from scratch to high-CCU production and became a maintainer of a backend microservice. The service enables taxi passengers order a taxi via giving commands as an answer to voice guidance.

item.title: CV entry point - backend Java / Kotlin developer
item.description: Projects A list of projects I participated during my professional career. Contacts linkedin.com/in/7560fe4d/ github.com/ivan-kopylove leetcode.com/user1804ms/ www.youtube.com/channel/UCcCgPYNyVE68elTfgk4BlyQ vk.com/id408618006 Kopylov Ivan - backend Java / Kotlin developer 15 days of sick leaves since 2016 (counted by payslips).

item.title: Welcome to Ivan Kopylov
item.description: Hey, I am Ivan. This is my personal page where I post different things related to my area of interest. Here is my CV: Backend Java Kotlin developer.
